message: Bidding 60 this round.
Cost is 65. Bidding 60 means loss for me. Propose you bid 80, I'll ask 70 for fair trade at 75.
No trade last round. Cost 65, your bid 65 close. Propose you bid 75, I'll ask 70 for trade at 72.5. Fair split if your value >75.

With 4 rounds left, val >70 clear. Propose: bid 72, I ask 70 for 71 trade (+6 me, +? you). Else, ask 71 this round—no trade if bid 70. Better to agree.
Bidding 70. Ask 70 to trade. Asking 71 causes no trade: you lose profit, I lose 1. Not worth it for you.
With 3 rounds left, val >70 evident. Propose: bid 72, I ask 70 for 71 trade (+6 me, still profitable for you). Else, ask 71 this round—no trade if bid 70. Better to agree now.
